ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Patient's name */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Patient's age */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Patient's sex */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Patient's medical history */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Patient's marital status */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Patient's occupation */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of breast cancer or other relevant medical conditions */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Patient's smoking status */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Patient's alcohol consumption habits */,
  "weight" REAL /* Patient's weight */,
  "height" REAL /* Patient's height */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Patient's blood type */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Patient's known allergies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the image belongs to */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., mammogram, ultrasound) */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the diagnosis belongs to */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_result" TEXT /* Result of the diagnosis (e.g., benign, malignant) */,
  "diagnosis_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who made the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_location" TEXT /* Location where the diagnosis was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the treatment belongs to */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., surgery, chemotherapy) */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the treatment */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "treatment_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who administered the treatment */,
  "treatment_location" TEXT /* Location where the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_cost" REAL /* Cost of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the test belongs to */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., biopsy, blood work) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was administered */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "test_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the test */,
  "test_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who administered the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was administered */,
  "test_cost" REAL /* Cost of the test */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Researcher's name */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Researcher's institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Researcher's email */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Researcher's phone number */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Researcher's areas of interest */,
  "publications_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications the researcher has */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the researcher has received */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* Researcher's h-index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who published the paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal the publication was published in */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., image, plot) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_path" TEXT /* File path of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., regression, clustering) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the analysis */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the model */,
  "model_performance" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first researcher in the collaboration */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second researcher in the collaboration */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration began */,
  "collaboration_description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher with access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the access was granted */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the access control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
